summary: Iteration 24: Tested new CMS section reordering feature (Layout tab). All 11 backend API tests passed. All UI tests passed. The Layout tab in /gestione-sito allows admin to reorder 8 sections (services, salon, about, promotions, reviews, gallery, loyalty, contact) using up/down arrows and toggle visibility with eye button. Fixed Hero and Footer items shown. Public site /sito renders sections dynamically based on saved order.
passed_tests: BACKEND API TESTS (11/11 passed):
1. GET /api/public/website returns section_order in config - PASS
2. Public website config structure validation - PASS
3. Admin login with admin@brunomelito.it / mbhs637104 - PASS
4. Admin login with wrong password returns 401 - PASS
5. GET /api/website/config (authenticated) returns section_order - PASS
6. PUT /api/website/config with new section_order saves correctly - PASS
7. PUT /api/website/config with hidden_sections saves correctly - PASS
8. GET /sito (public site) returns 200 - PASS
9. Public API section_order reflects in config for frontend - PASS
10. section_order contains all 8 expected sections - PASS
11. Default section_order validation - PASS
FRONTEND UI TESTS (all passed):
12. Admin login successful - redirected to Planning page - PASS
13. Navigate to /gestione-sito - PASS
14. Layout tab visible and clickable - PASS
15. All 8 reorderable sections found (services, salon, about, promotions, reviews, gallery, loyalty, contact) - PASS
16. Fixed Hero item shown with FISSO label - PASS
17. Fixed Footer item shown with FISSO label - PASS
18. 8 up arrow buttons found - PASS
19. 8 down arrow buttons found - PASS
20. 8 eye toggle buttons found - PASS
21. Section reorder (move down) works - PASS
22. Save button works - 'Configurazione salvata!' toast shown - PASS
23. Public site /sito loads correctly - PASS
24. Public site shows Hero, Services, Salon, About, Promotions, Loyalty, Contact, Footer sections - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Section reordering feature implemented correctly with proper data-testid attributes
WebsiteAdminPage.jsx has all required UI elements for Layout tab
WebsitePage.jsx correctly uses renderSection() to dynamically render sections based on config.section_order
Backend public.py correctly includes section_order in DEFAULT_WEBSITE_CONFIG and returns it in both authenticated and public endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified the new CMS section reordering feature. The Layout tab in /gestione-sito shows 8 reorderable sections with up/down arrows and eye toggle for visibility. Fixed Hero (always first) and Footer (always last) items are shown. The public site /sito dynamically renders sections based on the saved order from config.section_order. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.

frontend_pages./gestione-sito: Layout tab with section reordering UI
frontend_pages./sito: Public site renders sections dynamically based on order
